text:
# pkg_add -r pftop
Error: Unable ro get ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/i386/packages-9.0-release/Latest/pftop.tbz: file unavailable (e.g. file not found, no access)
pkg_add: unable to fetch 'ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/i386/packages-9.0-release/Latest/pftop/.tbz' by URL

How-To-Repeat: # pkg_add -r pftop
